steps.title: Solve
steps.content: Match the $y^5$ coefficient: $9r = 63$, so $r = 7$. Check with $y^4$: $-6(7) = -42$ ✓

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $7$; substituting or interpreting it in the original condition satisfies the requirement, so $7$ is the value to enter.
